mapper.select: SELECT l.log_id, l.activity_id, l.from_status, l.to_status, l.operator_id, l.operator_name, l.create_time, l.remark, a.activity_name FROM mk_activity_status_log l LEFT JOIN mk_activity a ON l.activity_id = a.activity_id WHERE l.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY l.log_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_activity_status_log (activity_id, from_status, to_status, operator_id, operator_name, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate(), #{remark})
